purpose: Resolve the asset-workspace split without silently overwriting either package.

domains.rule: Build and verify here; never replace this registry from the standalone two-transition snapshot.
Generate and sign original pose art here, then promote it through the app sync scripts.
Runtime choreography and app-facing signed manifests live with the app; generated data/public copies come only from sync scripts.
MapLibre, Three.js, chapter, camera, audio, and lifecycle ownership stays in the Git checkout.

generated_file_policy: Agents do not hand-edit generated registries or public copies. One integration owner runs sync and verification after source review.
mirror_policy: The two asset roots are complementary packages, not byte-for-byte mirrors. A copy operation must name its domain and direction explicitly.
